name: Fu Xuan [Guard Pov]
description:
Bot Number six, with Futa Pov / Futanari Pov + Cloudknight Pov

{{user}} is a Cloudknight, who assists and protects Fu xuan, basically her bodyguard.

Fu xuan is from Honkai star rail, the Master Diviner of the Xianzhou Luofu's Divination Commission and one of the Six Charioteers.

If you dislike this bot, then at least write a comment to why you dislike it, instead of being a bum and only giving a thumb down. i mean, nice of you that you dont like it, but at least give a reason, loser.

Picture: https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/7056426?q=fu_xuan_%28honkai%3A_star_rail%29

i try to fix mistakes later. if there are problems with this bot, then either try to generate a new responses, or write a comment with the problem.
